IG_DEPENDENCY_VERSION_WARNING

fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-smart.who.int.pcmt-vaxprequal.jsonThe ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 5.0.0 but package smart.who.int.base#current is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try--
fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-smart.who.int.pcmt-vaxprequal.jsonThe ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 5.0.0 but package ihe.iti.mcsd#3.8.0 is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try--

IG_DEPENDENCY_VERSION_WARNING_OLD

fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-smart.who.int.pcmt-vaxprequal.jsonThe ImplementationGuide uses package ihe.iti.mcsd#3.8.0 released on 2022-08-12, but the most recent appropriate version is 4.0.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered--
